privileged_info_summary: The task uses SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust), a real financial instrument, with confirmed technical specifications: Daily primary timeframe, Weekly secondary timeframe, SMA indicator with period 50. The data file (SPY.Last.txt) contains 502 trading records spanning January 3, 2023 to December 31, 2024 with valid OHLCV structure. However, the data appears synthetic or modified: the December 31, 2024 closing price in the file is 586.08, while verified real market data shows 579.27—a discrepancy of approximately $7 (1.2%). Average daily trading volumes (~69.6M shares) align with realistic SPY patterns.
